# UniGrok

> A local-first universal MCP gateway for xAI Grok models.

UniGrok gives MCP-compatible coding agents one shared, server-side gateway to Grok. The API and CLI execution planes remain distinct; never infer model availability across planes.

## Canonical resources
- Homepage: https://grokmcp.org
- Repository: https://github.com/djtelicloud/grok-mcp-server
- Architecture: https://github.com/djtelicloud/grok-mcp-server/blob/main/docs/reference.md
- IDE setup: https://github.com/djtelicloud/grok-mcp-server/blob/main/README.md#connect-your-ide
- Contribute: https://grokmcp.org/contribute
- Public project JSON: https://grokmcp.org/api/public/v1/project
- OKF knowledge bundle: https://grokmcp.org/docs/okf/okf-manifest.json

## Access boundaries
- Public project information is available without authentication.
- Contributor control uses GitHub login and a fresh server-side repository role check on every protected request. The minimum accepted role is triage.
- The default local MCP endpoint is http://localhost:4765/mcp.
- The private API-plane remote MCP is https://mcp.grokmcp.org/mcp. It uses OAuth PKCE, short-lived scoped tokens, and live repository-access introspection.
- No unauthenticated remote MCP or inference endpoint is published. Public machine-readable project information is deliberately separate from contributor controls.
- Never send an xAI API key to this website or embed it in an IDE MCP configuration.
